case_title: IN RE: SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC DBA PEACHTREE

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS WAS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Allison J. Wood of the Law Offices of Eason, Tambornini & Wood, 510-986-0406, appearing for petitioner and moving party
Carlos Santiago, defendant appearing in propria persona

Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights was denied for insufficient notice. Notice was sent via overnight delivery on July 3, 2006. Earliest hearing date could be is July 28, 2006. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
